signals.headline: XRP Price Movement Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Price Movement Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP surged to $1.39-$1.40 over 24 hours, outpacing the broader market's 0.88% gain[1]. The token recorded a +5.15% surge in the 48 hours following the wXRP launch[5]. XRP's spot ETF recorded $17+ million in net inflows on April 15 alone—the highest single day since February[3].

signals.headline: Solana's Cryptic "XRP" Post | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana's Cryptic "XRP" Post | YES | HIGH confidence**

Solana's official X account posted the single word "XRP" with logo animation, creating viral engagement and driving 24-hour trading volume to $2.8 billion[1]. This sparked intense cross-community speculation and memes[1].

signals.raw: **Cooper Flagg's historic performances**: Flagg scored 51 points vs. Orlando (April 3) and 45 points, 9 assists, 8 rebounds vs. injury-depleted Lakers (April 5), ending Mavs' 14-game home losing streak (134-128 win); first rookie with back-to-back 40+ point games since Allen Iverson[1][2][3][4][5][7].
